name: SPX FLOW, Inc.
description: SPX FLOW, Inc. is a leading global provider of highly engineered flow control technologies, process equipment, and turn-key systems. The company designs, manufactures, and services solutions that help customers in the food, beverage, industrial, and chemical markets optimize their operations. With operations in over 30 countries, SPX FLOW offers a diverse portfolio of pumps, valves, mixers, and dehydration equipment under well-known brands, helping to improve efficiency, safety, and sustainability across various process industries.
